pages.text: Death is rarely without consequence.$(br2)Some powers may return what was lost, but the world always remembers what you owed.$(br2)Soul Crystals, Extradimensional Vessels, and some Seven Curses items are tied to death recovery and retrieval.
pages.title: Soul Loss

pages.text: If you lose important items after death, first check whether they were preserved in a Soul Crystal or an Extradimensional Vessel.$(br2)Certain wayfinding items can help cursed bearers locate these containers.
pages.title: Hint
